questions.title: Clinical Assessment - Respiratory Distress
questions.question_text: What are the key observations you would monitor for a patient with respiratory distress?
expected_points: Assess respiratory distress using appropriate assessment tools
Monitor vital signs and observations specific to respiratory distress
Implement evidence-based interventions for respiratory distress
Document findings and care provided
Escalate concerns appropriately in pediatrics setting
